SelfHostingContextState.description: State model derived from SelfHostingContext TLA+ spec

INSTANCES.description: Verifier for invariant INSTANCES from SelfHostingContext spec

CW9_SPECS.description: Verifier for invariant CW9_SPECS from SelfHostingContext spec

TypeInvariant.description: Verifier for invariant TypeInvariant from SelfHostingContext spec

RootsAligned.message:
RootsAligned violation: phase = "COMPLETE" =>
        /\ target_root = engine_root
        /\ state_root  = engine_root
RootsAligned.description: Verifier for invariant RootsAligned from SelfHostingContext spec

SpecInInstancesDir.description: Verifier for invariant SpecInInstancesDir from SelfHostingContext spec

NoCW9Indirection.description: Verifier for invariant NoCW9Indirection from SelfHostingContext spec

PathsEqualConsistent.message:
PathsEqualConsistent violation: phase = "COMPLETE" =>
        paths_equal = (target_root = engine_root /\ state_root = engine_root)
PathsEqualConsistent.description: Verifier for invariant PathsEqualConsistent from SelfHostingContext spec

BoundedExecution.description: Verifier for invariant BoundedExecution from SelfHostingContext spec

SelfHostingCorrect.message:
SelfHostingCorrect violation: /\ RootsAligned
    /\ SpecInInstancesDir
    /\ NoCW9Indirection
    /\ SelfHostingFlagSet
    /\ PathsEqualConsistent
SelfHostingCorrect.description: Verifier for invariant SelfHostingCorrect from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_INSTANCES.description: Test assertion for INSTANCES from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_CW9_SPECS.description: Test assertion for CW9_SPECS from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_TypeInvariant.description: Test assertion for TypeInvariant from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_RootsAligned.condition:
phase = "COMPLETE" implies
        and target_root = engine_root
        and state_root  = engine_root
assert_RootsAligned.message:
Assertion failed: RootsAligned — phase = "COMPLETE" =>
        /\ target_root = engine_root
        /\ state_root  = engine_root
assert_RootsAligned.description: Test assertion for RootsAligned from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_SpecInInstancesDir.message: Assertion failed: SpecInInstancesDir — phase = "COMPLETE" => spec_dir_location = INSTANCES
assert_SpecInInstancesDir.description: Test assertion for SpecInInstancesDir from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_NoCW9Indirection.message: Assertion failed: NoCW9Indirection — phase = "COMPLETE" => spec_dir_location # CW9_SPECS
assert_NoCW9Indirection.description: Test assertion for NoCW9Indirection from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_PathsEqualConsistent.condition:
phase = "COMPLETE" implies
        paths_equal = (target_root = engine_root and state_root = engine_root)
assert_PathsEqualConsistent.message:
Assertion failed: PathsEqualConsistent — phase = "COMPLETE" =>
        paths_equal = (target_root = engine_root /\ state_root = engine_root)
assert_PathsEqualConsistent.description: Test assertion for PathsEqualConsistent from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_BoundedExecution.description: Test assertion for BoundedExecution from SelfHostingContext spec

assert_SelfHostingCorrect.condition:
and RootsAligned
    and SpecInInstancesDir
    and NoCW9Indirection
    and SelfHostingFlagSet
    and PathsEqualConsistent
assert_SelfHostingCorrect.message:
Assertion failed: SelfHostingCorrect — /\ RootsAligned
    /\ SpecInInstancesDir
    /\ NoCW9Indirection
    /\ SelfHostingFlagSet
    /\ PathsEqualConsistent
assert_SelfHostingCorrect.description: Test assertion for SelfHostingCorrect from SelfHostingContext spec
